Scoreboard Editor

GrapesJS Visual Editor

Create custom scoreboard layouts with drag-and-drop

Standalone App:

This is a separate Vite-based GrapesJS editor.

Use it to design custom scoreboard overlays, then export for use with the scoreboard app.

Quick Links:

Editor Features

Drag-and-drop scoreboard components

Custom fonts, colors, and backgrounds

Export to HTML/CSS/JS

Live preview mode

Template library
